description:
A detected divergence of a promoted candidate from its baseline run.

Pure data: constructed by a sensor, persisted by a store, rendered by the
Monitor UI. No behaviour beyond validation.

baseline_run_id.description: MatrixRun.id the candidate was promoted on (the baseline)
baseline_run_id.title: Baseline Run Id

baseline_score.description: 0–100 normalised baseline score for this candidate/tier
baseline_score.title: Baseline Score

delta.description: Signed score change: observed_score - baseline_score. Negative is a regression. Bounded to [-100, 100] since both operands are 0–100.
delta.title: Delta

detected_at.description: When the sensor detected the drift; tz-aware UTC
detected_at.title: Detected At

observed_score.description: 0–100 normalised score from the live sample
observed_score.title: Observed Score

product_id.description: Product whose promoted candidate this signal concerns
product_id.title: Product Id

severity.description: Severity band the sensor assigned. The delta-to-band thresholds are sensor configuration, not part of this model — see MFP-ADR-005.
severity.title: Severity

status.description: Lifecycle state; signals start 'active' until acknowledged
status.title: Status

summary.description: Human-readable one-line summary the Monitor view renders verbatim, e.g. 'kimi-k2-6 dropped 30 points on tier_1 vs baseline'.
summary.title: Summary

tier_id.description: Tier the drift was detected on, e.g. 'tier_1'
tier_id.title: Tier Id

title: DriftSignal
